decision_summary: Viewer owns its own package.json declaring the same dep set as fleet/dashboard (manifest commit 196220e). Neither vendor (copy of source) nor cross-repo link (path:../../fleet/dashboard). Source files port across in subsequent r1.5 nodes (viewer-extract-scaffold, viewer-port-*); deps are independently resolved in roadmap-engine repo so the viewer is buildable standalone.

options_considered.form: Copy fleet/dashboard/src + package.json wholesale into viewer/. License banner per template-license-banners.
options_considered.rejected_because: Two truths · drift inevitable · breaks §Fail-hard. Same Vue files exist in two repos with no canonical owner.

options_considered.form: viewer/package.json declares dependencies via { "@fleet/dashboard": "file:../../fleet/dashboard" } or pnpm workspace ref.
options_considered.rejected_because: Hard cross-repo coupling · fleet must exist on disk to build viewer · violates roadmap-engine independence (the engine repo must be stand-alone shippable). Also leaks fleet-shaped data sources (SSE+WS-proxy hardcoded for fleet) into the engine.

options_considered.form: viewer/package.json owns vue3 + vite + pinia + vue-router + tailwind-v4 + @vitejs/plugin-vue + vue-tsc + vitest at the same major versions as fleet (commit 196220e manifest). Subsequent r1.5 nodes port src/ files. realtimeBridge rewritten to read host-repo .roadmap/ instead of hardcoded /home/griffin/src/fleet/.roadmap/.
options_considered.selected_because: One canonical path · viewer self-contained · fleet/dashboard remains independent (its own thing for fleet's HMI domain) · roadmap-engine ships standalone.

server_plugins_note: 9 server plugins (adbPlugin · specCatalogPlugin · servicesPlugin · roadmapPlugin · dagPlugin · trailPlugin · assayPanelPlugin · cockpitMetaPlugin · eventsPlugin) currently hardcoded for fleet · only roadmapPlugin/dagPlugin/trailPlugin/eventsPlugin port to roadmap-engine viewer; SSE bridge rewritten to host-repo .roadmap/. WS-proxy and adb/specs/services/assay/cockpitMeta plugins are fleet-specific and DO NOT port. Documented for viewer-rewrite-realtime-bridge node.

validate.evidence: +96 packages · pinia 2.3.1 · vue 3.5.33 · vue-router 4.6.4 · vite 7.3.2 · tailwindcss 4.2.4 · vue-tsc 2.2.12 · vitest 4.1.5 · Done in 1.3s using pnpm v10.28.2

fail_hard_compliance: ONE canonical path (extract-clean) · no graceful both-paths · viewer/ self-resolves deps · no fallback to fleet/dashboard.
next_dependent_node: viewer-data-source-adapter (consumes this decision · ports realtimeBridge.ts + dagReader.ts + roadmapReader.ts + trailReader.ts into viewer/src/services/ pointed at host-repo .roadmap/)
